summary: Iteration 8: Tested new Chit Fund Dividend System. Fixed data migration issue for old chit records (total_amount→chit_value, is_won→is_lifted). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Add Chit modal with chit_value field, Monthly Entry modal with auction_amount and live dividend calculation preview, Lift modal, Detail modal with dividend column and net profit calculation.

fixed.issue: Old chit records with total_amount/is_won fields caused ResponseValidationError (missing chit_value)
fixed.fix: Added migrate_chit_data() function to transform old field names to new format on-the-fly

passed_tests: POST /api/chit-funds - Create chit fund with chit_value field
GET /api/chit-funds - List all chit funds (with data migration)
POST /api/chit-funds/{id}/monthly-entry - Add entry with auction_amount, auto-calculates dividend
Monthly entry updates chit totals (total_paid, total_dividend, payments_count)
GET /api/chit-funds/{id}/monthly-entries - List entries with dividend column
POST /api/chit-funds/{id}/lift - Mark chit as lifted, adds CREDIT to cash book
DELETE /api/chit-monthly-entries/{id} - Delete entry and update totals
GET /api/chit-funds/{id}/summary - Single chit summary with net profit (not lifted)
GET /api/chit-funds/{id}/summary - Single chit summary with net profit (lifted)
GET /api/chit-funds/summary/all - Overall summary across all chits
Monthly entry creates DEBIT transaction in cash book
Cash book shows chit_fund category transactions

monthly_entry_modal.info_note: EMI automatically Cash Book me Debit hogi

lift_modal.info_note: Ye amount Cash Book me Credit ho jayega

critical_code_review_comments: Data migration function migrate_chit_data() handles backward compatibility for old chit records
Dividend formula correctly implemented: (chit_value - auction_amount) / total_members
Net profit calculation: When lifted = lifted_amount + total_dividend - total_paid; When not lifted = total_dividend
Cash book integration working: Monthly entry creates DEBIT, Lift creates CREDIT
Hindi/Hinglish labels throughout the UI for better user experience
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chit Fund Dividend System fully tested. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_chit_fund_dividend.py covers all new APIs. Data migration function added to handle old records with total_amount/is_won fields. Frontend modals verified: Add Chit (chit_value), Monthly Entry (auction_amount + live dividend preview), Lift, Detail (dividend column + net profit).

bug_fixed.description: Old chit records caused ResponseValidationError due to missing chit_value field
bug_fixed.root_cause: Database had records with old schema (total_amount, is_won) but new Pydantic model requires chit_value, is_lifted
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added migrate_chit_data() function in server.py to transform old field names to new format on-the-fly in GET endpoints
bug_fixed.verification: GET /api/chit-funds now returns all chits including old ones with migrated field names
